lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What's this place?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Why you wretched Son-of-a-Big-Nosed-Warty-Smelly- Goblin! How dare you speak to a commanding officer like that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... err...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Stand straight! Chest out, shoulders back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, okay.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: You'll address me as captain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yea... yes, captain!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Better. Now what is a low-life, pathetic excuse for a human being doing sniffing around my arena?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exploring, captain. Looked like a chance for combat, sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Very well, make the most of this because I don't suffer idiots easily! This is the Barbarian Assault arena. You want to sign up with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir, yes sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Then listen closely.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Wait a minute! I'm not giving a tutorial to someone carrying that stuff. Use that bank chest over there first!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's skip the training, I'm an expert already.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Really? You don't look like one. Very well, upon your own head be it, I'll let you skip the training. Come back and speak to me if you find you're not the know-it-all you believe yourself to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nah, sounds boring.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: 'Boring'? You'll get nowhere with that kind of attitude! Drop and give me ten!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe next time, I need to go wash my hair.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: You'll do as I say!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Arrrghhh. Okay, okay!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir, yes sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Good to see you've learned some respect, make it five

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes sir!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I already did!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: You did?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir, yes sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: I don't trust you in the slightest. Do as I tell you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi... I mean, [player name] reporting, sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Straighten that back when you talk to me! You want my help?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Again? Very well. Listen closely this time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir! Could I start at wave one again?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: What? Finish with your training first, soldier!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi... I mean, [player name] reporting, sir!

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Straighten that back when you talk to me! You want my help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir! Can we do some training?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Again? Very well. Listen closely this time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir! Could I start at wave one again?

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: What do you mean, you are on wave one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, of course, sorry.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: You're currently on wave [current wave #]. So you want to start on wave one again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, reset my wave to one.

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Very well, I'll reset you to wave one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, sir.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No sir, I want to stay on wave [current wave #].

lines.speaker: Captain Cain
lines.text: Stop wasting time!
